title: The Wasp Factory
lines: The air here is thick with the scent of ozone and something sweet, like rotting nectar. Massive, rusted industrial machines grind and hiss in the darkness.
High above, the ceiling is a lattice of golden geometric patterns that seem to vibrate with an intense, low-frequency hum. This is no longer a human factory.
Vast, translucent honeycombs are draped over the steel rafters, dripping a thick, glowing amber fluid onto the concrete floor.

options.desc: 1. Venture deeper into the golden hum
2. Search the industrial ruins for loot
